channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-21-264 -- Large Health Services Research Demonstration and Dissemination Projects for Prevention of Healthcare-Associated Infections (R18).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-019 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-21-165 -- Large Research Projects for Prevention of Healthcare-Associated Infections (R01) .
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-018 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-22-047-- Large Research Projects for Combating Antibiotic-Resistant Bacteria (CARB) (R01).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-017 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-22-048 -- Large Health Services Research Demonstration and Dissemination Projects for Combating Antibiotic-Resistant Bacteria (CARB)(R18).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-016 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-22-051-- AHRQ Mentored Career Enhancement Awards for Established Investigators in Patient-Centered Outcome Research (K18).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-015 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-22-168 -- AHRQ Administrative Supplements for Grants in Health Services Research
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-014 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: DARPA-developed autonomous helicopter technology transitions to U.S. Army
item.description: An experimental, fly-by-wire H-60Mx Black Hawk, equipped with DARPA-funded autonomy, has been delivered to the U.S. Army for testing.

item.title: Notice of Informational Webinar on the NIGMS Predoctoral Basic Biomedical and Medical Scientist Training Programs (T32)
item.description: Notice NOT-GM-26-004 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NSF invests $11M to expand AI professional development for K-12 teachers nationwide
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation today announced an $11 million award to the Computer Science Teachers Association (CSTA) in furtherance of the executive order on "Advancing Artificial Intelligence Education for American Youth." The award will…

item.title: What Are the Components of a Collaborative International Research Project (PF5) Application and What Should Be Included?
item.description: If you are preparing a Collaborative International Research Project (PF5) application, understanding what belongs in each required and optional component can help ensure your submission is complete, responsive, and clearly structured for review.

item.title: Notice of NIGMS Participation in PA-25-422 "Ruth L. Kirschstein National Research Service Award (NRSA) Individual Predoctoral Fellowship (Parent F31)"
item.description: Notice NOT-GM-26-002 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: What Should I Know About the New Biographical Sketch Common Form?
item.description: The Biographical Sketch Common Form must be used for all NIH grant application, Just-in-Time, Research Performance Progress Report (RPPR), and Prior Approval submissions  to NIH with due dates on or after January 25, 2026.

item.title: Reminder: Next NIH Fellowship Application Due Date Is Approaching
item.description: Have you explored our Fellowship opportunities? We wanted to remind you that NIH fellowships are open to early career scientists, including at the predoctoral and postdoctoral level.

item.title: Inviting Input on a Proposed Clinical Trial Specific Application Form
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-058 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Ruth L. Kirschstein National Research Service Award (NRSA) Stipends, Tuition/Fees and Other Budgetary Levels Effective for Fiscal Year 2026
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-044 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Fiscal Policies in Effect for FY 2026
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-059 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Legislative Mandates in Effect for FY 2026
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-060 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Request for Information (RFI): Seeking Input on the NIDCD Support of Clinical Trials
item.description: Notice NOT-DC-26-026 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Findings of Research Misconduct
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-041 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-22-238--AHRQ Conference Grant Programs (R13).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-013 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-22-232--AHRQ Mentored Clinical Scientist Research Career Development Award (K08).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-012 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-23-290-- AHRQ Improving Diagnostic Safety in Ambulatory Care: Strategies and Interventions (R18).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-011 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-093--Systems-Based Approaches to Improve Patient Safety by Improving Healthcare Worker Safety and Well-Being (R01 Clinical Trial Optional) .
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-010 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration of PA-24-261-- Examining the Impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on Healthcare Safety (R18).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-009 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: New NIH FAQ for Basic Experimental Studies with Humans (BESH)
item.description: NIH has developed a Frequently Asked Question (FAQ) for investigators planning applications with Basic Experimental Studies with Humans (BESH) on or after May 25, 2026 to clarify that the information in the latest Guide Notice only applies to basic science studies/BESH.

item.title: Request for Information (RFI): Inviting Comments and Suggestions on a Framework for the NIH-Wide Strategic Plan for Fiscal Years 2027-2031
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-047 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts
